description: Example body for POST /api/submitThreat (with Authorization: Bearer <token>). Organization users should match registered organization name.

sample.attack_description: Targeted emails impersonating IT with fake SSO portal.
sample.how_it_happened: Users clicked link; credentials entered on attacker-controlled page.
sample.impact: Two accounts compromised; no lateral movement observed.
sample.mitigation: Reset passwords, MFA enforcement, user awareness block.
